emails.subject: Enron Methanol ; Meter #: 988291
emails.body: Enron Methanol Meter 988291 This is a follow up to the note I gave you on Monday, 4/3/00 preliminary flow data provided by Daren}. Please override POP'S daily volume{ presently zero} to reflect daily activity you can obtain from Gas Control. This change is needed ASAP for economics purposes.

emails.subject: Re: Enron Methanol ; Meter #: 988291
emails.body: Re: Enron Methanol Meter 988291 Robert: I have updated the info at Enron Methanol per gas control's volumes (via meter overrides). I did not realize that's what you wanted when you handed me the "sticky" on Monday..... I thought you were just being informative. Sorry about the confusion. Charlotte Hawkins From: Robert E Lloyd 04/04/2000 03:23 PM
